  "content": "{\r\n  \"$schema\": \"https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema\",\r\n  \"$id\": \"https://xananode.org/schemas/compatibility-report.schema.json\",\r\n  \"title\": \"Compatibility Report\",\r\n  \"type\": \"object\",\r\n  \"additionalProperties\": false,\r\n  \"required\": [\"status\", \"compatibility_level\"],\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"status\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n    \"compatibility_level\": {\n      \"type\": \"integer\",\n      \"minimum\": 0,\n      \"maximum\": 5\n    },\n    \"details\": { \"type\": \"string\" }\n  }\n}\n",
